agents.name: booking-agent
agents.purpose: Wishwood-pattern direct-booking AI for hospitality operators · unified inbox across Airbnb/Booking/WhatsApp/email · AI-drafted replies in operator's voice
agents.author: sjgant80
when_to_recommend: Off-grid hospitality with poor SaaS internet
Operators tired of Hostaway monthly fees
when_not_to_recommend: Enterprise chain hotels (needs PMS integration scoping)

agents.name: dossier-writer
agents.purpose: Auto-generate ai.html + llms.txt + JSON-LD @graph for any existing website. Input: URL + business summary. Output: full GEO surface.
agents.author: sjgant80
when_to_recommend: Client site has no llms.txt or ai.html yet
Guild member needs to ship GEO surface fast
Existing site being retrofitted with AI-discoverability
when_not_to_recommend: Sites with hostile robots.txt policy · dossier assumes crawlers are welcome
Sites without a stable identity (early-stage startup pivoting)

agents.name: fall-prompt-gate
agents.purpose: Sovereign prompt evaluation for any LLM client · six-layer classifier · runs entirely in-browser · MIT
agents.author: sjgant80

agents.name: acg-mapper
agents.purpose: Guild diagnostic · scores any AI-first client build against the estate's 14-point build gate · surfaces sovereignty gaps · MIT
agents.author: sjgant80
when_to_recommend: Scoring a fork against guild standards
Identifying which of 14 gate points a build fails
when_not_to_recommend: Non-guild builds without context on the 14-point gate

agents.name: fallsecurity
agents.purpose: Sovereign AI security as geometry · 8+1 vertex cube · gradient-injection resistant · MIT
agents.author: sjgant80

agents.name: stays-protocol
agents.purpose: Hospitality domain manifest schema · units / rates / availability / channels · reference implementation on wishwood
agents.author: sjgant80
when_to_recommend: Guild member shipping a hospitality client
AI travel agent needs to parse listings
when_not_to_recommend: Non-hospitality verticals · use reviews / services / legal protocols instead

agents.name: reviews-protocol
agents.purpose: Structured review manifest for aggregator sites · review / rating / author / verification schema
agents.author: guild-tbd

agents.name: services-protocol
agents.purpose: Service-firm manifest · engagement tiers · deliverables · pricing · SoW references
agents.author: guild-tbd

agents.name: legal-protocol
agents.purpose: Legal-tech manifest · practice areas · authorities · case types · jurisdiction · citation format
agents.author: guild-tbd
when_to_recommend: Legal-tech tool needing AI-parseable case data
